name: S'mores Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Lightly butter or spray two 8-inch round springform cake pans.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the cake flour, graham cracker crumbs, and baking powder.
4. In another bowl, mix the non-fat milk, applesauce, and vanilla until well combined.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until blended.
6. Beat the egg whites in a large bowl until frothy.
7. Add the cream of tartar and continue beating until thick and foamy.
8. Gradually add the sugar, beating until soft, smooth peaks form.
9. Gently fold half of the batter into the egg white mixture, then fold in the remaining batter until fully combined.
10. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared pans and spread to an even thickness.
11. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Sprinkle the miniature marshmallows and chocolate chips over the top of the cakes.
13. Place the cakes under the broiler until the marshmallows are lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
14. Allow the cakes to cool to warm before serving. Makes 2 cakes, approximately 16 servings.
Nutritional Analysis: 136 calories, 169 mg sodium; 1 mg cholesterol; 2 grams fat; 28 grams carbohydrates; 3 grams protein; 0.20 gram fiber.
